title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you enjoy shopping? What do you usually buy?
How careful are you with money? Do you save regularly?
Do you prefer to buy things online or in shops? Why?
How has the way you shop changed compared to a few years ago?
Do you think advertising influences what people buy?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think people today are too focused on material possessions?
How important is it to spend money on experiences rather than things?
Do you think advertising makes people unhappy with what they have?
